name: Almost Risotto
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Good Seasons Gourmet Parmesan Italian Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the broth and salad dressing mix to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the orzo and reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the orzo is tender.
3. Stir in the mushrooms. Serve with Di Giorno Grated Parmesan Cheese if desired.
Prep Time: 5 minutes
Cooking Time: 10 minutes
